# https://payrolljamaica.com
# Format: https://llmstxt.org

# Payroll Jamaica

> Jamaica's #1 cloud payroll and HR software. Automate PAYE, NIS, NHT, Education Tax, and HEART/NSTA calculations, generate compliant payslips, and manage statutory compliance for Jamaican businesses.

## About

Payroll Jamaica is purpose-built for Jamaica's regulatory environment. It handles all mandatory statutory deductions — PAYE income tax, NIS, NHT, Education Tax, and HEART/NSTA Trust levy — automatically, so business owners, HR managers, and accountants can run accurate payroll in minutes.

## Key Features

- Automated PAYE, NIS, NHT, Education Tax, HEART/NSTA calculations (2025/2026 rates)
- Compliant payslip generation
- Statutory remittance reports (TAJ / MOF format)
- Employee management and leave tracking
- Role-based access and audit trails
- Bank payment file exports (NCB, JN, Scotiabank, Sagicor, FirstCaribbean)
- CSV employee import and data migration

## Jamaica Payroll Statutory Rates (2025/2026)

| Deduction | Employee | Employer | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| PAYE | 25% / 30% | — | Threshold JMD $1,500,096/year; 30% above JMD $6M |
| NIS | 3% | 3% | Ceiling JMD $5,000,000/year |
| NHT | 2% | 3% | No ceiling |
| Education Tax | 2.25% | 3.5% | No ceiling |
| HEART/NSTA | — | 3% | Employer-only levy; no ceiling |

Minimum wage: JMD $16,000 per 40-hour work week (effective June 2025).
